summary: Senior software engineer with ~9 years building web applications and backend services across product teams in e-commerce and healthtech.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Lead engineer on the checkout platform serving millions of orders per month
Designed and shipped a service that reduced payment-failure retries by 40%
Introduced contract tests and CI gates that cut production regressions
Mentored three engineers and ran the team's design-review process

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built patient-facing scheduling features end to end (React + Node.js)
Migrated a monolith module to a service with zero-downtime cutover
Improved API p95 latency by 35% through query and caching work

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
highlights: Delivered features across a Java/Spring web application
Wrote the team's first automated integration test suite

strengths: Breaking ambiguous problems into shippable milestones
coreValues: Sustainable, steady pace over short-term heroics
End-to-end ownership of what I build
rawExperienceText: Senior software engineer, ~9 years. Lumen Retail (2021–Present) — Senior Software Engineer on the checkout platform (millions of orders/month); cut payment-failure retries 40%; added contract tests and CI gates. Atlas Health (2017–2021) — Software Engineer; patient scheduling features in React + Node.js; migrated a monolith module to a service with zero downtime; improved API p95 latency 35%. Brightline Labs (2014–2017) — Junior Software Engineer; Java/Spring web app; built the first integration test suite. Skills: TypeScript, Python, Java, React, Node.js, Spring Boot, AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions, PostgreSQL, Redis, REST API design, CI/CD.
